series_metadata.series_description: The Permanent Authorization Form (AC-2) is submitted by the Third Party Administrator (TPA) and/or the employer. The AC-2 provides permanent rights to the TPA to view or access any of the employers’ rate information. The AC-2 is scanned into the Universal Document Service (UDS). UDS is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper AC-2 forms are immediately scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS) when they are received. AC-2 forms are in UDS they are reviewed quality assurance. If qaulity is accepted, paper form can be destroyed. ; Electronic: AC-2 forms are scanned into Universal Document Service (UDS). If policy is cancelled and there is no balance
